review: We were in the mood to do a puzzle so we called Amazing Discoveries. They gave us a brief rundown of what they had in stock. We asked them their COVID protocol and headed over. They don't let more than 6 people in the store at one time. Parking and entry is in the back due to roadwork and construction on Broadway. They have a table with sanitizer in the entry hallway as well. The staff kindly directed us to the puzzle shelf when we arrive. The store is super clean and spread out. Staff are friendly. We were in and out in less than ten minutes. We'd definitely come back again! They do have online ordering but it does not appear that the in-store inventory matches what they have online, so if you're looking for something specific, call first!
